---
title: "Connect a vendor to another vendor"
description: "Will connect a person to a company or vice versa"
---

`PUT /vendor/{id}/connect/{to}`

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | string | ID of a vendor |
| `to` | string | ID of a vendor to connect to |

## Example Response

```json
{
  "vendor": {
    "Id": "1234",
    "Name": "John Smith",
    "Companies": [
      { "Id": "4567", "Name": "Acme Co" }
    ]
  }
}
```
